calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: GAP-2 microhabitat zones -- substrate readiness diagnostic (corrected C2; supersedes V3-EXQ-577)
items.notes: infant_substrate:GAP-2 readiness, corrected C2 (supersedes V3-EXQ-577 per failure_autopsy_EXQ-577_2026-05-16). V3-EXQ-577 C2 was a false-negative: it demanded per-episode presence of ALL base zones {0,1,2}, fighting the deliberately stochastic Voronoi seeding (~2-3% of episodes legitimately absorbed one niche into the D ecotone). Corrected C2: per episode assert WELL-FORMEDNESS only (no -1 in interior, codes subset {0,1,2,3}, border 3 present, >=2 base zones); assert {0,1,2} present AGGREGATED over episodes; report base-zone-collapse frequency + redraw-guard counters as DIAGNOSTIC stats (expect ~0 collapses now the GAP-2 degenerate-seeding redraw guard has landed in _build_microhabitat_zones). C1 (bit-identical OFF) / C3 (zone-C zero hazard + zone-B density > zone-A) / C4 (zone-C ambient fires+decays) unchanged. experiment_purpose=diagnostic (no governance weighting; claim_ids=[]). GAP-2 unblocks DEV-NEED-001/003/007 + ARC-065 via the full infant pipeline.
